sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Board Shakeup And Buybacks Might Change The Case For Investing In Suncor Energy (TSX:SU)
feed.summary: Suncor Energy recently appointed Jennifer Kneale to its Board of Directors and key committees, while also confirming a CAD 0.60 quarterly dividend and completing CAD 2.80 billion in share repurchases. This move, combining fresh expertise with ongoing capital returns, reinforces Suncor's focus on governance and disciplined capital allocation. Although these actions don't fundamentally alter the balance between capital returns and long-term carbon risks, they strengthen the investment case for those valuing consistent dividends and buybacks.
